title: UPSC CPF Assistant Commandant CAPF Online Form 2026
post_name: UPSC Combined Central Armed Police Force CAPF 2026 Recruitment Apply Online for 349 Post

fees.Exam Center Instruction: The exam city is on first come first serve basis, so if you want the exam city of your choice then apply as soon as possible.

fee_payment_method: Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking in State Bank of India or E Challan Fee Mode
how_to_apply: Union Public Service Commission UPSC Central Armed Police Forces CAPF Recruitment 2026 Candidate Can Apply Between 20/03/2026 to 12/03/2026
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment 2026 Apply Online Form for CAPF Armed Force Various Post Form Latest UPSC Vacancies 2026.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
